subcodes.first_line: O thou real friend! Your letter was received. Its content was very effective. The heart and the soul were moved. It was my hope to come to California... But know thou, verily, that I associate with heart and conscience with firm friends
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @consolation and comfort
